mnemonics: C.I.E. = Continuously Integrate Everything (like a CI/CD pipeline for learning)
keyPoints: CIE is an ongoing assessment method, not a single exam.
It evaluates a student's understanding throughout the module.
It helps in identifying and addressing learning gaps early.
commonMistakes: Confusing CIE with a final exam or a one-time test.
Assuming it only measures rote memorization instead of applied conceptual understanding.
Neglecting its formative purpose and treating it as solely summative.
